title: Hip-Hop and R&B
description: Questions about hip-hop and R&B music

questions.question: Which rapper is known as Slim Shady?
questions.explanation: Eminem is an American rapper whose alter ego is Slim Shady.

questions.question: Which rapper released the album The College Dropout in 2004?
questions.explanation: The College Dropout is Kanye West's debut album, released in 2004.

questions.question: Which artist sings Hotline Bling?
questions.explanation: Hotline Bling is Drake's 2015 hit that has become a viral meme.

questions.question: What city did hip-hop music originate from?
questions.explanation: Hip-hop was born in the Bronx area of ​​New York in the 1970s.

questions.question: Which rapper is known as the King of Rap and died in 1996?
questions.explanation: Tupac Shakur was shot in 1996. in Las Vegas. He is considered one of the most influential rappers.

questions.question: Which artist produced the album To Pimp a Butterfly?
questions.explanation: To Pimp a Butterfly (2015) - Kendrick Lamar's album, considered one of the best hip-hop albums.

questions.question: Who is a DJ in hip-hop music?
options: A musician playing a record player
questions.explanation: A DJ uses turntables and mixers to play music and create beats.

questions.question: Which rapper is famous for the song Lose Yourself from the movie 8 Mile?
questions.explanation: Lose Yourself - Eminem's Oscar-winning song from the movie 8 Mile.

questions.question: Which artist is known as the Queen of R&B?
questions.explanation: Mary J. Blige is often referred to as the Queen of R&B due to her influence on the genre.

questions.question: Which rapper founded the music label Aftermath Entertainment?
questions.explanation: Dr. Dre founded Aftermath Entertainment in 1996, where Eminem and 50 Cent debuted.
